name: spoken financing offer trips the Financial Special Ad Category rule
description: A video voiceover narrating a financing offer ('just $199 a month, no money down') MUST FAIL meta.spoken_financial (block) — financing must run under Meta's Financial Special Ad Category whether the offer is written or spoken.

creative.voiceover_text:
Need a new roof?
Get yours for just $199/month with no money down.
Call us today.
